title: Determine the exact value of R(C12, C12, C12)
micro_paper_assessment: Main exact claim remains open. Current output is a real obstruction slice, but still too thin for the micro-paper lane on its own.
generalization_signal: Balanced 4-part blow-up obstruction scales across the even-cycle family, but the stability reduction from arbitrary colorings is still missing.
candidate_theorem_slice: Any balanced 4-part blow-up of the proper 3-coloring of K4 with part size 6 already contains a monochromatic C12 via a monochromatic K_{6,6}.
next_action: Recover the explicit 23-vertex lower-bound template or prove a stability reduction showing that any K24 counterexample must create a monochromatic K_{6,6}-type obstruction.
